title: erysimum puberulum
intro: Erysimum puberulum, also known as the hairy wallflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to soothe and calm the skin. The health benefits of Erysimum puberulum include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the affected area.
